slug.fullDescription:
Potassium is a lifetime premium Windows script executor costing $22.99, featuring: 

* Simple, clean executor interface/internal executor
* 100% sUNC
* Fast updates under normal Roblox update conditions
* Comes with a decompiler built in and supports Multi-Instance

! Things to keep in mind: 

! This exploit uses **kernel-level injection**, meaning that after using it, you will need to restart your PC to play games with kernel-level anticheats. This could also cause rare issues you wouldn’t normally see on a user-mode executor (BSODs, weird memory errors, etc.).

! This exploit has been **detected** in the past due to certain exploit functions, but those functions have been fixed. You should still keep this in mind when testing sUNC scores.

Otherwise, this exploit is a very good deal compared to other subscription-based exploits. A good exploit environment for developers on a budget. Offers decent stability for most users, but for the best experience, we recommend using [Windows 11](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/software-download/windows11).
No description currently available. Check back soon!

Xeno is a free external Windows script executor, featuring: 

* No key system, only advertisements to download
* 32% sUNC 
* Often, the **first** exploit to update under normal Roblox update conditions.
* Comes with [Konstant Decompiler](https://discord.com/invite/konstant-tm-tm-lykooking-tm-krack-tm-tm-tm-tm-1277806964356939837) and supports Multi-Instance
* Easy-to-use interface for new exploiters

Xeno has built a solid reputation, mostly blowing up for new exploit users. It does receive frequent updates, with new functions always being added, but, similarly to Solara, you’ll be limited in what you can use Xeno for.

! Things to keep in mind: 

! Due to the nature of being an **external executor** (Doesn’t inject internally), Xeno lacks exploit functions that many scripts use. If you are looking to develop scripts or use scripts with more advanced features, you’ll need to use another executor. But overall, for basic use, Xeno serves its purpose very well.
No description currently available. Check back soon!
No description currently available. Check back soon!

slug.fullDescription:
Volt (previously AWP.GG) is a premium Windows script executor costing $5.99 weekly, featuring: 

* Working Hyperion Emulation
* VSCode IDE Style UI
* 98% sUNC (Uses Medal for the decompiler, causing it not to get 100%)
* Optimized Multi-Instance (Be sure to check out Volt’s tiers or consider purchasing the farmer package directly on [VOLT.BZ](https://volt.bz), as they have an instance cap on their normal tiers!)
* Fast updates under normal Roblox update conditions

! Things to keep in mind: 

! While under the AWP.GG name, this exploit had a **long downtime period**, but after rebranding (And possibly switching developers), all existing users were compensated, and it has been reliably updating ever since. 

For a better decompilation experience, consider purchasing [Oracle Decompiler](https://discord.gg/decompiler) for $11.63 alongside it, but for most cases, [Medal Decompiler](https://github.com/Stefanuk12/medal-decompiler) serves just fine.
No description currently available. Check back soon!
No description currently available. Check back soon!

Solara is a free external Windows script executor, featuring: 

* No key system, only advertisements to download the bootstrapper/portable download
* 39% sUNC 
* Often, one of the first exploits to update under normal Roblox update conditions
* Comes with [Konstant Decompiler](https://discord.com/invite/konstant-tm-tm-lykooking-tm-krack-tm-tm-tm-tm-1277806964356939837) and supports Multi-Instance
* Easy-to-use interface for new exploiters

Solara has built a great reputation since its release as one of the first external Roblox executors to hit the market, and has been steadily receiving updates for over a year!

! Things to keep in mind: 

! Due to the nature of being an **external executor** (Doesn’t inject internally), Solara lacks exploit functions that many scripts use. If you are looking to develop scripts or use scripts with more advanced features, you’ll need to use another executor. But overall, for basic use, Solara serves its purpose very well.
No description currently available. Check back soon!

Wave is a premium Windows script executor, costing $5.99 weekly, featuring: 

* Nice executor interface 
* 100% sUNC, Decompiler, Multi-Instance support
* Decent reputation

Wave is one of the oldest premium exploits still available on the market (dating back to KRAMPUS.GG), although a different team now develops Wave.

! Things to keep in mind: 

! The experience of using this executor is not as great due to the **new developers** working on it (not the same developers from 2025), but they have at least proven they are able to keep updating

! The executor interface is the same as [Fusion](https://www.youtube.com/live/6yLGExPnRHY), though it is said that it was **sold** to them

! **For the price, there are other options that might perform better**
No description currently available. Check back soon!

Volcano is a premium Windows script executor developed by Co, costing $5.97 weekly, featuring: 

* Clean executor interface
* SysGuard (Cheatbuddy’s sandboxing solution)
* 96% sUNC
* Decent update speed under normal Roblox update conditions
* Comes with a decompiler built in and supports Multi-Instance

Volcano originally operated as a Freemium exploit, but after SysGuard was implemented, it turned to a subscription-based model. 

! Things to keep in mind: 

! Previously, Volcano operated under the name **Electron** (the same one from **Pre-Hyperion/UWP**) until releasing multiple times Post-Hyperion and facing banwaves. Existing Electron customers were compensated with a Lifetime Volcano key, and since then, no banwaves have occurred due to client-modification detections being implemented in Roblox after the Hunt event.
No description currently available. Check back soon!

Isaeva is a new product developed by Nihon's owner. Nihon was a decently popular product because of its clean executor interface, custom functions, and an in-depth executor environment. Around 2024, Nihon’s development team split into Zenith, and Nihon soon stopped receiving updates. Months later, after Zenith’s discontinuation, Isaeva was released.

! Things to keep in mind:

! Isaeva is still pretty new; buying long subscriptions is not recommended.

! Isaeva offers reliable updates and a great interface, but it’s not **guaranteed** to keep up with new Hyperion updates/detections (as with any executor).

Cosmic is a budget-friendly premium Windows script executor priced at $10.00 lifetime, featuring:

* Working Multi-Instance
* Decompiler
* 100% sUNC
* Custom UI Support
* Fast updates under normal Roblox update conditions

! Things to keep in mind:
! Cosmic has quickly gained attention in the exploiting community, with some users claiming it performs better than Potassium while being $10 cheaper, making it an obvious great choice for newer exploiters on a budget and experienced script developers, thanks to its good environment. However, it is still a relatively new executor, so its long-term reliability and lifespan are not yet fully proven.
